# Architecture

> Generated by `/architecture` on 2026-03-23.  Re-run any time to refresh.

---

## Domain Map

This project is organised into **4 top-level domain packages**, an extended set of
helper modules at the root of `harness_skills/`, a `skills/` directory of 34
agent-callable skill scripts, and a comprehensive `tests/` suite.

---

### 1 · `harness_skills` — Core Framework

The main framework package.  The root `__init__.py` is intentionally **empty**
(`__all__ = []`); all public symbols are owned by the sub-packages below.

| Sub-package | Public surface (`__all__`) | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `harness_skills.models` | `Status`, `Severity`, `GateResult`, `Violation`, `HarnessResponse`, `ArtifactFreshness`, `FileLocation`, `TaskInfo`, `AgentConflict`, `CreateConfigResponse`, `CreateResponse`, `ContextManifest`, `ContextManifestFile`, `ContextStats`, `SearchPattern`, `SkipEntry`, `EvaluateResponse`, `ErrorGroupResponse`, `DomainOverview`, `ErrorAggregationResponse`, `RegressionGateConfig`, `CoverageGateConfig`, `SecurityGateConfig`, `PerformanceGateConfig`, `ArchitectureGateConfig`, `PrinciplesGateConfig`, `DocsFreshnessGateConfig`, `TypesGateConfig`, `LintGateConfig`, `LockRecord`, `LockStateResponse`, `LockOperationResponse`, `LockListResponse`, `ManifestValidateResponse`, `LogEntry`, `ObserveResponse`, `StalePlanResponse`, `StatusDashboardResponse`, `TelemetryReport`, `UpdateResponse`, … | Shared Pydantic response models — **foundation layer, zero local dependencies** |
| `harness_skills.gates` | `CoverageGate`, `DocsFreshnessGate`, `SecurityGate`, `PerformanceGate`, `PrinciplesGate`, `GateEvaluator`, `GateFailure`, `GateOutcome`, `EvaluationSummary`, `HarnessConfigLoader`, `run_gates` | Built-in evaluation gate runners; reads `harness.config.yaml` via `HarnessConfigLoader` |
| `harness_skills.generators` | `EvaluationReport`, `GateFailure`, `GateId`, `GateResult`, `GateStatus`, `Severity`, `run_all_gates`, `generate_gate_config`, `generate_manifest`, `validate_manifest` | Artifact generators — evaluation reports, gate configs, and harness manifest |
| `harness_skills.plugins` | `PluginGateConfig`, `PluginGateRunner`, `load_plugin_gates`, `run_plugin_gates` | YAML-driven custom gate plugin system (no Python required) |
| `harness_skills.cli` | `cli`, `PipelineGroup` | `harness` CLI entry point — all subcommands, supports `--then` pipeline chaining |
| `harness_skills.utils` | *(empty — internal helpers only)* | Shared internal utilities; no public API |

**Top-level helper modules** (single-file, not sub-packages):

| Module | Key symbols | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `harness_skills.boot` | `BootConfig`, `IsolationConfig`, `boot_instance` | Agent boot & per-worktree sandbox isolation (schema, file, container strategies) |
| `harness_skills.handoff` | `HandoffDocument`, `HandoffProtocol`, `HandoffTracker`, `SearchHints` | Agent context handoff protocol — continuity across sessions |
| `harness_skills.resume` | `load_plan_state`, `resume_agent_options` | Agent resume orchestration |
| `harness_skills.task_lock` | `TaskLock`, `TaskLockProtocol`, `LockConflictError` | Cross-process task locking |
| `harness_skills.logging_config` | `configure`, `get_logger`, `set_trace_id` | **Logging provider** — sole source of structured logging setup |
| `harness_skills.stale_plan_detector` | `detect_stale_plan`, `PlanTask` | Detects stale plans whose artifacts or tasks have gone cold |
| `harness_skills.error_aggregation` | `ErrorRecord`, `ErrorGroup`, `ErrorAggregationView` | Error log query and aggregation |
| `harness_skills.error_query_agent` | `build_error_tools`, `run_error_query` | LLM-powered error analysis via claude-agent-sdk |
| `harness_skills.dom_snapshot_skill` | — | DOM snapshot façade — delegates to `dom_snapshot_utility` |
| `harness_skills.performance_hooks` | `PerformanceTracker`, `ToolTiming`, `MemorySnapshot` | Performance timer tracking |
| `harness_skills.telemetry` | *(base class)* | Telemetry base class |
| `harness_skills.telemetry_reporter` | `build_report`, `render_report` | Telemetry aggregation CLI command |
| `harness_skills.pr_effectiveness` | `ArtifactType`, `PRRecord` | PR effectiveness metrics |
| `harness_skills.effectiveness_stats` | — | Effectiveness statistics aggregation |

---

### 2 · `dom_snapshot_utility` — Browser-Free DOM Inspection

Standalone package.  **No dependencies on other local packages.**

| Symbol | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `DOMSnapshot`, `PageMeta`, `Heading`, `Link`, `Button`, `InputField`, `Form`, `AriaRegion`, `TableSnapshot`, `ImageSnapshot` | Structured DOM snapshot models |
| `snapshot_from_html`, `snapshot_from_url`, `snapshot_to_text` | Public API functions |

Used by `harness_skills.dom_snapshot_skill` as a façade layer.

---

### 3 · `harness_dashboard` — Effectiveness Scoring & Dashboard

Self-contained package.  **No dependencies on other local packages.**  Internal modules: `models`, `scorer`, `dashboard`, `data_generator`.

| Symbol | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `compute_scores` | Score a list of `HarnessRecord` objects |
| `render_dashboard` | Render the Rich terminal effectiveness dashboard |
| `generate_dataset` | Generate a synthetic dataset for testing / demos |
| `ArtifactType`, `HarnessRecord`, `PRRecord` | Domain models |

---

### 4 · `log_format_linter` — Structured-Log Linter

Standalone package.  **No dependencies on other local packages.**  Internal modules: `checker`, `detector`, `generator`, `models`, `cli`.

| Symbol | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `generate_rules` | Generate per-framework linter rules |
| `detect_framework` | Detect the logging framework in use |
| `check_file`, `check_directory` | Scan source files for log-format violations |
| `Language`, `LogFramework`, `LogLinterConfig`, `LogViolation`, `ViolationSeverity`, `GeneratorResult` | Domain models |

---

### 5 · `skills/` — Agent-Callable Skill Scripts (34 skills)

Each skill is a standalone CLI entry-point with its own `SKILL.md` routing metadata.

| Skill | Script | Depends on |
|---|---|---|
| `context-handoff` | `scripts/read_handoff.py` | `harness_skills.handoff` |
| `write_handoff` | `write_handoff.py` | `harness_skills.handoff` |
| `harness-resume` | `scripts/resume.py` | `harness_skills.resume` |
| `dom-snapshot` | `scripts/snapshot_dom.py` | `harness_skills.dom_snapshot_skill` |
| `error-aggregation` | `scripts/query_errors.py` | `harness_skills.error_aggregation`, `harness_skills.error_query_agent` |
| `debt-tracker` | `debt_tracker.py` | standalone |
| `logging-convention` | `scripts/generate_spec.py` | standalone |
| `perf-hooks` | `scripts/query_perf.py` | `harness_skills.performance_hooks` |
| `progress-log` | `progress_log.py` | standalone |
| `screenshot` | `scripts/capture_screenshot.py` | playwright |
| `shared-state` | `shared_state.py` | standalone |
| `exec_plan` | `exec_plan.py` | standalone |
| *(+ 22 additional skills)* | `skills/*/SKILL.md` | varies |

---

### 6 · `harness_skills.cli` — CLI Subcommands

| Subcommand | Module | Responsibility |
|---|---|---|
| `harness create` | `cli/create.py` | Generate `harness.config.yaml` and `harness_manifest.json` |
| `harness evaluate` | `cli/evaluate.py` | Run all configured gates and emit evaluation report |
| `harness lint` | `cli/lint.py` | Code linting gate |
| `harness observe` | `cli/observe.py` | Structured log observation |
| `harness status` | `cli/status.py` | Status dashboard |
| `harness manifest` | `cli/manifest.py` | Manifest validation and schema generation |
| `harness context` | `cli/context.py` | Context introspection and `ContextManifest` emission |
| `harness completion-report` | `cli/completion_report.py` | Task completion report |
| `harness boot` | `cli/boot.py` | Boot a new worktree instance |
| `harness fmt` | `cli/fmt.py` | Code formatting |
| *(global)* | `cli/verbosity.py` | `--verbosity` option wired to `logging_config` |

**`PipelineGroup`** (in `cli/main.py`) enables `--then` chaining:
```
harness create --then evaluate --then status
```

---

### 7 · `harness_skills.gates` — Built-in Gate Implementations

| Gate | Module | What it checks | Default threshold |
|---|---|---|---|
| Coverage | `gates/coverage.py` | Code coverage (XML / JSON / LCOV) | ≥ 90 % |
| Docs Freshness | `gates/docs_freshness.py` | Stale harness-generated artifacts | — |
| Security | `gates/security.py` | CVEs (pip-audit) + code smells (bandit) | critical = 0 |
| Performance | `gates/performance.py` | Benchmark regressions vs baseline | configurable |
| Principles | `gates/principles.py` | Coding principle violations | — |
| Plugin gates | `plugins/` | YAML-defined custom checks | per-plugin |

`HarnessConfigLoader` (in `gates/runner.py`) reads `harness.config.yaml` and maps
profiles → gate configurations → gate runners.

---

### 8 · `harness.config.yaml` Profiles

| Profile | Gates enabled |
|---|---|
| **starter** | regression, coverage, docs_freshness, lint |
| **standard** | + security, types |
| **advanced** | + performance, architecture, principles |

---

### 9 · Top-Level Orchestration Scripts

| Script | Depends on | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `coordinate.py` | `harness_skills.task_lock` | Multi-agent conflict detection |
| `task_lock.py` | `harness_skills.task_lock` | Re-export shim |
| `harness_status.py` | `harness_skills.handoff` | Status reporting |
| `harness_telemetry.py` | `harness_skills` (CLI / models) | Telemetry reporting |
| `harness_context.py` | `harness_skills` (context helpers) | Context introspection |
| `checkpoint_agent.py` | — | Git-based checkpoint |
| `git_checkpoint.py` | — | Git checkpoint utility |
| `handoff.py` | `harness_skills.handoff` | Handoff protocol |
| `stale_plan_detector.py` | `harness_skills.stale_plan_detector` | Stale plan CLI |

---

## Dependency Graph

```
harness_skills
├── models          ◄── (foundation layer; zero local deps)
│   └── base, create, completion, context, errors, evaluate,
│       gate_configs, lint, lock, manifest, observe, performance,
│       stale, status, telemetry, update
│
├── plugins ──────► models
│   └── gate_plugin, loader, runner
│
├── gates ─────────► models
│   │             ► plugins
│   └── coverage, docs_freshness, security, performance,
│       principles, runner
│
├── generators ───► models
│   └── evaluation, config_generator, manifest_generator
│
├── cli ──────────► models
│   │             ► generators
│   │             ► gates (via evaluate subcommand)
│   └── boot, completion_report, context, create, evaluate,
│       fmt, lint, main, manifest, observe, status, verbosity
│
└── utils           (internal helpers, no public API yet)

harness_skills.dom_snapshot_skill ──────► dom_snapshot_utility
harness_skills.error_query_agent  ──────► harness_skills.error_aggregation
harness_skills.effectiveness_stats ─────► harness_skills.pr_effectiveness

skills/ (agent skill scripts)
├── context-handoff   ──► harness_skills.handoff
├── write_handoff     ──► harness_skills.handoff
├── harness-resume    ──► harness_skills.resume
├── dom-snapshot      ──► harness_skills.dom_snapshot_skill
├── error-aggregation ──► harness_skills.error_aggregation
│                     ──► harness_skills.error_query_agent
└── perf-hooks        ──► harness_skills.performance_hooks

Top-level orchestration scripts
├── coordinate.py        ──► harness_skills.task_lock
├── task_lock.py         ──► harness_skills.task_lock  (re-export shim)
├── harness_status.py    ──► harness_skills.handoff
├── harness_telemetry.py ──► harness_skills (CLI / models)
└── harness_context.py   ──► harness_skills (context helpers)

Standalone packages (no local deps)
├── dom_snapshot_utility
├── harness_dashboard
└── log_format_linter
```

---

## Module Boundary Analysis

> All 10 domain packages have `__all__` declared — all boundaries are **EXPLICIT**.

```
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  Domain                      Init file      API surface    Violations
  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  dom_snapshot_utility        __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    1
  harness_dashboard           __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    5
  harness_skills (root)       __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    0
  harness_skills/cli          __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    1 (private)
  harness_skills/gates        __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    5
  harness_skills/generators   __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    3
  harness_skills/models       __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    17
  harness_skills/plugins      __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    6
  harness_skills/utils        __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    0
  log_format_linter           __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    1
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  10 domains   39 total violations   0 domains need __all__
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
```

### Open Violations

**dom_snapshot_utility** (1):
- `tests/test_dom_snapshot.py:24` → `from dom_snapshot_utility.snapshot import …`
  *(fix: `from dom_snapshot_utility import DOMSnapshot, snapshot_from_html, …`)*

**harness_dashboard** (5):
- `tests/test_scorer.py:18` → `from harness_dashboard.models import …`
- `tests/test_scorer.py:24` → `from harness_dashboard.scorer import compute_scores`
- `tests/test_scorer.py:102` → `from harness_dashboard.scorer import _tier, EffectivenessTier` ⚠️ private symbol
- `tests/test_data_generator.py:19` → `from harness_dashboard.data_generator import generate_dataset`
- `tests/test_data_generator.py:20` → `from harness_dashboard.models import ArtifactType, HarnessRecord, PRRecord`
  *(fix: `from harness_dashboard import compute_scores, generate_dataset, ArtifactType, …`)*

**log_format_linter** (1):
- `tests/test_log_format_linter.py:25` → `from log_format_linter.cli import main as cli_main`
  *(fix: expose `main` in `log_format_linter/__init__.py`, then `from log_format_linter import main as cli_main`)*

**harness_skills/generators** (3):
- `harness_skills/cli/evaluate.py:40` → `from harness_skills.generators.evaluation import …`
- `harness_skills/cli/create.py:40` → `from harness_skills.generators.config_generator import …`
- `tests/test_generators/test_evaluation.py:20` → `from harness_skills.generators.evaluation import …`
  *(fix: use `from harness_skills.generators import …`)*

**harness_skills/models** (17 across production + tests):

*Production code:*
- `harness_skills/stale_plan_detector.py:52,53` → `.models.base`, `.models.stale`
- `harness_skills/telemetry_reporter.py:36,37` → `.models.base`, `.models.telemetry`
- `harness_skills/cli/status.py:56,57` → `.models.base`, `.models.status`
- `harness_skills/cli/observe.py:62` → `.models.observe`
- `harness_skills/plugins/gate_plugin.py:9` → `.models.base`
- `harness_skills/plugins/runner.py:4` → `.models.base`
- `harness_skills/gates/coverage.py:57` → `.models.gate_configs`
- `harness_skills/gates/runner.py:68,82` → `.models.gate_configs`, `.models.base`
- `harness_skills/generators/config_generator.py:31` → `.models.gate_configs`

*Tests:*
- `tests/test_stale_plan_detector.py:12` → `.models.base`
- `tests/plugins/test_integration.py:11,12` → `.models.base`, `.models.evaluate`
- `tests/gates/test_coverage.py:40` → `.models.gate_configs`
- `tests/plugins/test_runner.py:10,136,150` → `.models.base`
- `tests/plugins/test_gate_plugin.py:11` → `.models.base`
- `tests/test_models/test_observe.py:24` → `.models.observe`
  *(fix: use `from harness_skills.models import Status, GateResult, …` throughout)*

**harness_skills/plugins** (6):
- `harness_skills/gates/runner.py:83,84` → `.plugins.loader`, `.plugins.runner`
- `tests/plugins/test_integration.py:13,14` → `.plugins.loader`, `.plugins.runner`
- `tests/plugins/test_runner.py:11,12` → `.plugins.gate_plugin`, `.plugins.runner` (+ private `_record_telemetry`) ⚠️
- `tests/plugins/test_gate_plugin.py:12` → `.plugins.gate_plugin`
- `tests/plugins/test_loader.py:9,10` → `.plugins.gate_plugin`, `.plugins.loader`
  *(fix: use `from harness_skills.plugins import PluginGateConfig, load_plugin_gates, …`)*

**harness_skills/gates** (3, all in tests):
- `tests/gates/test_coverage.py:30` → `.gates.coverage` (+ private symbols)
- `tests/gates/test_docs_freshness.py:6` → `.gates.docs_freshness` (+ private symbols) ⚠️
- `tests/gates/test_runner_plugin_integration.py:20` → `.gates.runner`
  *(fix: use `from harness_skills.gates import CoverageGate, GateEvaluator, run_gates, …`)*

**harness_skills/cli** (1 — private symbol):
- `tests/test_models/test_observe.py:232` → `from harness_skills.cli.observe import _emit` ⚠️ private
  *(fix: refactor test to exercise the public interface only)*

> ⚠️ = private symbol (leading `_`) imported across a boundary — always forbidden regardless of `__all__`.

---

## Enforcement

Boundary rules are encoded as **blocking** principles `MB001`–`MB014` in
`.claude/principles.yaml` and are automatically enforced by:

- `/check-code` — scans staged files against all `MB*` principles
- `/review-pr`  — flags deep imports and private-symbol leaks in PR diffs

Re-run `/architecture` at any time to refresh this document.
